main_window.toggle_tip: Show or hide the settings panel
main_window.recursive_file_search_tip: Find source files recursively under the selected folder.
main_window.sample_tip: Choose the folder with images used to train the model.
main_window.label_tip: Choose the folder with masks or labels used for training.
main_window.performance_label_template: Batch timing | data: {data_wait_ms:.1f} ms | augmentation: {augmentation_ms:.1f} ms | forward: {forward_ms:.1f} ms | backward: {backward_ms:.1f} ms | optimizer: {optimizer_ms:.1f} ms | total: {total_ms:.1f} ms
main_window.update_busy_message: Stop the active task first, then start the update again.
main_window.update_ready_to_install:
Update {new_version} has been downloaded. The application will close and the installer will start.
Continue?
main_window.update_download_failed: Failed to download or start the update: {error}
main_window.update_check_not_configured: The update source is not configured.
main_window.update_check_in_progress: Update check is already in progress.
main_window.update_select_label: Choose a version to install or roll back to:
main_window.update_missing_download: The selected version does not contain an installer path.
main_window.update_selected_current: The selected version is already installed.
main_window.update_confirm_selected: Install version {selected_version} over the current version {current_version}?

settings_panel.shuffle_frames_tip: Randomize frame order during training so the model does not learn sequence-specific patterns.
settings_panel.shuffle_patches_in_frame_tip: In online mode, randomize the order of patches extracted from the same frame.
settings_panel.sync_patch_sizes_tip: When enabled, the recognition patch size automatically follows the training patch size.
settings_panel.recursive_file_search_tip: Find source, training, and label files recursively under selected folders.
settings_panel.epochs_tip: How many full passes over the training data to run.
settings_panel.rotate_90_tip: Adds 90° and 270° rotations to training data. Useful when object orientation may vary.
settings_panel.rotate_180_tip: Adds upside-down frames to training data. Useful when top and bottom orientation is not important.
settings_panel.flip_x_tip: Adds frame variants mirrored relative to the X axis.
settings_panel.flip_y_tip: Adds frame variants mirrored relative to the Y axis.
settings_panel.extra_aug_tip: Applies random brightness, contrast, and noise changes to improve robustness on new data.
settings_panel.photometric_augmentation_toggle_tip: Apply photometric brightness, contrast, gamma, noise, and blur changes.
settings_panel.random_crop_tip: In online mode, use random patch coordinates instead of a fixed extraction grid. Patch step is ignored.
settings_panel.crops_per_image_tip: How many random crops to sample from one image in online random crop mode.
settings_panel.scale_augmentation_tip: Adds an extra zoomed-in or zoomed-out patch variant for each online sample.
settings_panel.sample_size_tip: Patch size passed to the model.
settings_panel.shift_tip: Step between neighboring patches when extracting them on a fixed grid.
settings_panel.scale_augmentation_strength_tip: How strongly scale augmentation zooms patches in or out before resizing them back.
settings_panel.synthetic_defect_generator_group_tip: Generate additional fully synthetic topology samples and image-only synthetic defects for training.
settings_panel.synthetic_defect_generator_enabled_tip: Generate synthetic image/mask pairs with non-intersecting procedural traces and optional image-only synthetic defects.
settings_panel.synthetic_dataset_factor_tip: How many synthetic samples to generate per epoch relative to the real train dataset size.
settings_panel.synthetic_image_size_tip: Full synthetic frame size. The frame is generated first and then cut into patches exactly like a real image from disk.
settings_panel.synthetic_trace_count_tip: Minimum and maximum number of non-intersecting conductive traces generated in one synthetic sample.
settings_panel.synthetic_segment_count_tip: Minimum and maximum number of Manhattan segments used to build each synthetic trace.
settings_panel.synthetic_trace_half_width_tip: Minimum and maximum half-width of generated copper traces in pixels.
settings_panel.synthetic_background_noise_sigma_tip: Minimum and maximum standard deviation of the low-level background grayscale noise in synthetic images.
settings_panel.synthetic_trace_noise_sigma_tip: Minimum and maximum standard deviation of grayscale noise applied only inside synthetic traces.
settings_panel.tech_augmentation_tip: Synthesize new conductive branches, shortcuts and local reroutes on binary metallization masks.
settings_panel.tech_augmentation_debug_pair: Debug: return original and synthesized mask
settings_panel.tech_augmentation_debug_pair_tip: Keep the original and synthesized masks together for visual sanity checks.
settings_panel.tech_aug_min_operations_tip: Minimum number of geometric variation operators sampled for one binary mask.
settings_panel.tech_aug_max_operations_tip: Maximum number of geometric variation operators sampled for one binary mask.
settings_panel.tech_aug_max_changed_pixels_ratio_tip: Reject augmented masks that modify too many pixels compared with the reference topology.
settings_panel.tech_aug_max_foreground_ratio_delta_tip: Reject augmented masks when total metal fill changes too much.
settings_panel.tech_aug_global_width_probability_tip: Probability of global line-width drift via dilation or erosion.
settings_panel.tech_aug_scale_rethreshold_probability_t: Probability of scale drift simulated via resize and binary rethreshold.
settings_panel.tech_aug_blur_threshold_probability_tip: Probability of edge smoothing via blur and binary rethreshold.
settings_panel.tech_aug_boundary_aware_probability_tip: Probability of perturbing only a narrow band around metallization boundaries.
settings_panel.tech_aug_local_morphology_probability_ti: Probability of local dilation or erosion inside random ROIs.
settings_panel.tech_aug_gap_variation_probability_tip: Probability of closing narrow gaps or opening thin bridges.
settings_panel.extra_aug_brightness_tip: How strongly brightness may change. 0 = off, 1 = strongest variation.
settings_panel.extra_aug_contrast_tip: How strongly contrast may change. 0 = off, 1 = strongest variation.
settings_panel.extra_aug_gamma_tip: How strongly gamma correction may shift darker and lighter tones.
settings_panel.extra_aug_noise_prob_tip: Probability of adding noise to each patch during training.
settings_panel.extra_aug_noise_sigma_tip: Strength of the added noise. Higher values produce more visible noise.
settings_panel.extra_aug_blur_prob_tip: Probability of applying Gaussian blur to a training patch.
settings_panel.extra_aug_blur_radius_tip: Blur radius used by Gaussian blur augmentation.
settings_panel.validation_tip: Keep part of the data out of training and use it only to monitor model quality.
settings_panel.sample_group_tip: Disk mode saves patches in advance. Online mode creates patches during training.
settings_panel.cut_to_disk: Cut patches and save to disk
settings_panel.optimizer_tip: The algorithm used to update model weights during training.
settings_panel.mixed_precision_tip: GPU compute mode. `off` disables AMP, `fp16` is usually faster, `bf16` is often more stable on newer GPUs.
settings_panel.loss_function_tip: Enable one or more loss terms, assign each coefficient, and keep the total coefficient sum at or below 1.0. The panel enforces this limit online.
settings_panel.dice_loss_weight_tip: How much the Dice part contributes in a combined loss such as `bce_dice` or `ce_dice`.
settings_panel.iou_loss_weight_tip: How much the IoU part contributes in `bce_iou`.
settings_panel.lr_tip: Learning rate. Too high can make training unstable, too low can make training slow.
settings_panel.wd_tip: Regularization strength used to reduce overfitting.
settings_panel.batch_tip: How many patches are processed in one step.
settings_panel.train_batch_tip: Training batch size. Increase it only if GPU memory allows.
settings_panel.dataloader_num_workers_tip: Number of worker processes used by the training DataLoader. Use -1 for automatic selection.
settings_panel.recognition_batch_tip: How many patches are processed at once during recognition.
settings_panel.overlap_tip: Overlap between neighboring recognition windows. Helps reduce seams at tile borders.
settings_panel.recognition_jpeg_quality_tip: JPEG quality for recognition output images. 100 = best quality and larger files.
settings_panel.recognition_binarize_output_tip: Convert probabilities into a binary mask before saving.
settings_panel.deprecated_models_tip: Older architectures kept for backward compatibility and comparison runs.
settings_panel.experimental_models_tip: Architectures under evaluation that may require extra validation before production use.
settings_panel.deep_supervision_tip: Train convolutional segmentation models with auxiliary decoder heads.
settings_panel.recognition_use_auto_threshold_tip: Use the threshold selected on validation and saved inside the model artifact.
settings_panel.recognition_threshold_tip: Probability threshold used to convert recognition output into a binary mask.
settings_panel.confidence_save_mode_tip: Choose whether to skip confidence output or save it from the model output or TTA result.
settings_panel.recognition_tta_tip: Apply flip-based test-time augmentation when forming the final recognition mask.
settings_panel.confidence_tta_tip: Apply flip-based test-time augmentation when forming the confidence map.
settings_panel.recognition_postprocess_tip: Apply simple morphology to clean up the binary mask.
settings_panel.recognition_postprocess_kernel_size_tip: Odd kernel size used for binary mask cleanup after thresholding.
settings_panel.recognition_multiprocessing_tip: Speeds up recognition via separate cut/predict/sew processes and automatically falls back to single-thread mode when unsuitable.
settings_panel.save_validation_binary_images: Save binary validation predictions after each epoch
settings_panel.save_validation_binary_images_tip: Save binary predictions for validation samples after each epoch into the run artifact folder.
settings_panel.validation_source_tip: Choose between validation split from the training dataset or a separate validation dataset.
settings_panel.validation_image_path_tip: Folder with validation images used when external validation mode is selected.
settings_panel.validation_image_path_placeholder: Click to choose validation image folder
settings_panel.validation_label_path_tip: Folder with validation labels used when external validation mode is selected.
settings_panel.validation_label_path_placeholder: Click to choose validation label folder
settings_panel.log_update_frequency_tip: How often to refresh logs in number of batches. 0 = automatic.
settings_panel.multi_gpu_tip: Allows training on multiple GPUs when they are available.
settings_panel.torch_compile_tip: Attempts to speed up the model by compiling the PyTorch graph. Use only with supported PyTorch builds.
settings_panel.warmup_tip: Gradually increases the learning rate during the first epochs for a more stable start.
settings_panel.scheduler_tip: Learning-rate schedule applied after optimizer updates.
settings_panel.scheduler_plateau_factor_tip: Multiplier applied to the learning rate when ReduceLROnPlateau triggers.
settings_panel.scheduler_plateau_patience_tip: How many epochs without improvement to wait before reducing the learning rate.
settings_panel.scheduler_plateau_threshold_tip: Minimum loss improvement that counts as progress for ReduceLROnPlateau.
settings_panel.scheduler_plateau_min_lr_tip: Lower bound for the learning rate used by ReduceLROnPlateau.
settings_panel.scheduler_plateau_cooldown_tip: How many epochs to wait after a reduction before resuming Plateau checks.
settings_panel.scheduler_cosine_t_max_tip: Number of scheduler epochs used by one cosine annealing cycle.
settings_panel.scheduler_cosine_eta_min_tip: Minimum learning rate reached by CosineAnnealingLR.
settings_panel.scheduler_one_cycle_max_lr_tip: Peak learning rate reached by OneCycleLR.
settings_panel.scheduler_one_cycle_pct_start_tip: Fraction of training steps spent increasing the learning rate in OneCycleLR.
settings_panel.scheduler_one_cycle_anneal_strategy_tip: Shape of the learning-rate decay curve in OneCycleLR.
settings_panel.scheduler_one_cycle_div_factor_tip: Initial LR is max_lr divided by this factor in OneCycleLR.
settings_panel.scheduler_one_cycle_final_div_factor_tip: Minimum LR is initial LR divided by this factor in OneCycleLR.
settings_panel.scheduler_one_cycle_three_phase_tip: Use the original three-phase OneCycle schedule instead of the fast two-phase variant.
settings_panel.scheduler_step_lr_step_size_tip: How many epochs to wait between StepLR reductions.
settings_panel.scheduler_step_lr_gamma_tip: Multiplier applied to the learning rate on each StepLR decay step.
settings_panel.hard_mining_tip: Increases how often patches with high error are shown to the model.
settings_panel.hard_pixel_mining_tip: Makes the loss pay more attention to the hardest pixels instead of averaging everything equally.
settings_panel.random_artifacts_tip: Overlay synthetic textured artifacts on training images only.
settings_panel.random_artifacts_probability_tip: Probability of adding synthetic artifacts to a training sample.
settings_panel.random_artifacts_count_tip: How many synthetic artifacts may be added to one training sample.
settings_panel.random_artifacts_size_ratio_tip: Maximum artifact size relative to patch width and height.
settings_panel.cutout_probability_tip: Probability of applying cutout to a training sample.
settings_panel.cutout_holes_tip: How many rectangular regions to erase in one sample.
settings_panel.cutout_size_ratio_tip: Size of each cutout rectangle relative to patch width and height.
settings_panel.mixup_probability_tip: Probability of applying mixup to a training batch.
settings_panel.mixup_alpha_tip: Beta distribution alpha parameter used to sample mixup lambda.
settings_panel.pcb_defects_group_tip: Synthetic image-only defects applied on top of synthetic topology.
settings_panel.pcb_defects_probability_tip: Probability of injecting one or more synthetic PCB defects into a training sample.
settings_panel.pcb_defects_min_count_tip: Minimum number of sequential PCB defects generated for one augmented sample.
settings_panel.pcb_defects_max_count_tip: Maximum number of sequential PCB defects generated for one augmented sample.
settings_panel.pcb_defects_use_input_mask: Use provided PCB mask for defect placement
settings_panel.pcb_defects_use_input_mask_tip: Use the input binary mask to place defects on valid copper structures when available.
settings_panel.pcb_defects_use_defect_mask_as_label: Use defect mask as training label
settings_panel.pcb_defects_use_defect_mask_as_label_tip: Return the generated defect mask as the supervision target for synthetic-defect segmentation.
settings_panel.pcb_break_severity_tip: At minimum creates small local breaks; at maximum produces larger conductor gaps.
settings_panel.pcb_short_severity_tip: At minimum bridges only the nearest traces; at maximum can short more distant traces.
settings_panel.pcb_missing_copper_severity_tip: Controls how much copper is removed in one synthetic missing-copper defect.
settings_panel.pcb_excess_copper_severity_tip: Controls how large synthetic copper growths and burrs become.
settings_panel.pcb_pinhole_severity_tip: Controls the size of synthetic pinholes inside copper regions.
settings_panel.pcb_spurious_copper_severity_tip: Controls the size and reach of isolated synthetic copper islands.
settings_panel.pcb_via_severity_tip: Controls the amount of synthetic via shift, resize, and partial loss.
settings_panel.pcb_misalignment_severity_tip: Controls the scale of local synthetic layer misregistration.
settings_panel.skip_uniform_labels: Skip patches with fully empty or fully filled masks
settings_panel.skip_uniform_labels_tip: Useful when the dataset contains many non-informative patches without useful structure.
settings_panel.rare_patch_oversampling_enable: Oversample patches with selected rare regions
settings_panel.rare_patch_oversampling_tip: In online mode, repeats patches that intersect manually selected rare regions.
settings_panel.rare_patch_oversampling_factor_tip: How many times to repeat patches that intersect selected rare regions.
settings_panel.edit_rare_regions_tip: Open the editor for manual selection of rare and difficult regions.
settings_panel.reset_defaults_tip: Restore all settings to their default values.
settings_panel.augmentation_preview_button_tip: Open a preview window that applies the selected training augmentations to dataset samples.
settings_panel.early_stopping_tip: Stops training when validation quality is no longer improving.
settings_panel.restore_best_tip: Load the best validation checkpoint when training stops.

field_descriptions.model: The neural network architecture used for training and recognition.
field_descriptions.image_format: Input image format: Grayscale for one channel or RGB for three channels.
field_descriptions.sync_patch_sizes: When enabled, the recognition patch size automatically follows the training patch size.
field_descriptions.recursive_file_search: Find source, training, and label files recursively under selected folders.
field_descriptions.train_patch_size: Patch size along X and Y used for training.
field_descriptions.recognition_patch_size: Window size along X and Y used during recognition.
field_descriptions.augmentation_brightness_strength: How much the brightness multiplier may vary around the original value.
field_descriptions.augmentation_contrast_strength: How much the contrast multiplier may vary around the original value.
field_descriptions.augmentation_gamma_strength: How much gamma correction may shift darker and lighter tones around the original image.
field_descriptions.augmentation_noise_probability: How often noise is added to a patch.
field_descriptions.augmentation_noise_sigma: Noise intensity. Higher values produce stronger and more visible noise.
field_descriptions.augmentation_blur_probability: How often Gaussian blur is applied to a patch.
field_descriptions.augmentation_blur_radius: Blur radius used by Gaussian blur augmentation.
field_descriptions.shift: How far the extraction window moves between neighboring patches. Smaller values create more samples and more load.
field_descriptions.crops_per_image: How many random crops should be sampled from one image in online random crop mode.
field_descriptions.scale_augmentation_strength: How strongly scale augmentation should zoom patches in or out before resizing them back.
field_descriptions.tech_aug_min_operations: Minimum number of technology-variation operators applied to one mask.
field_descriptions.tech_aug_max_operations: Maximum number of technology-variation operators applied to one mask.
field_descriptions.tech_aug_max_changed_pixels_ratio: Maximum share of pixels that may change relative to the original binary topology.
field_descriptions.tech_aug_max_foreground_ratio_delta: Maximum allowed change of the total metallization fill ratio after augmentation.
field_descriptions.tech_aug_global_width_probability: How often to apply global line-width changes across the whole mask.
field_descriptions.tech_aug_scale_rethreshold_probability: How often to simulate another process scale via resize and rethreshold.
field_descriptions.tech_aug_blur_threshold_probability: How often to smooth edges via blur followed by binary rethreshold.
field_descriptions.tech_aug_boundary_aware_probability: How often to perturb only the boundary band while keeping polygon interiors stable.
field_descriptions.tech_aug_local_morphology_probability: How often to apply local dilation or erosion inside random regions only.
field_descriptions.tech_aug_gap_variation_probability: How often to model narrow-gap closure or thin-bridge opening.
field_descriptions.validation_percent: What percentage of data should be reserved for validation.
field_descriptions.edge_cut: How many pixels to crop from image borders before other preprocessing.
field_descriptions.compression_factor: Downscale each frame by this factor, then restore it to the original size before model input.
field_descriptions.optimizer_presets: Quick presets with common optimizer settings.
field_descriptions.optimizer: Algorithm used to update model weights.
field_descriptions.learning_rate: How fast the model weights change after each step.
field_descriptions.train_batch_size: Number of patches in one training step.
field_descriptions.recognition_batch_size: Number of patches processed at once during recognition.
field_descriptions.overlap: Overlap between neighboring recognition windows. Higher values reduce seams at borders.
field_descriptions.recognition_jpeg_quality: JPEG quality of recognition output files.
field_descriptions.recognition_threshold: Probability threshold used to convert recognition output into a binary mask.
field_descriptions.confidence_save_mode: Choose whether to save a separate confidence map file during recognition.
field_descriptions.recognition_tta_enabled: Run flip-based test-time augmentation before averaging the final recognition mask.
field_descriptions.confidence_tta_enabled: Run flip-based test-time augmentation before forming the confidence map.
field_descriptions.recognition_postprocess_kernel_size: Odd kernel size used for binary mask cleanup after thresholding.
field_descriptions.log_update_frequency: How many batches to wait before refreshing logs. 0 enables automatic mode.
field_descriptions.mixed_precision: Mixed precision mode used to speed up training and reduce GPU memory usage.
field_descriptions.loss_function: Select one or more loss terms, set their coefficients, and combine them into a single training objective.
field_descriptions.dice_loss_weight: Contribution of the Dice component in a combined loss.
field_descriptions.iou_loss_weight: Contribution of the IoU component in a combined loss.
field_descriptions.warmup_epochs: How many epochs should use a gradual learning-rate warmup.
field_descriptions.warmup_start_factor: Initial learning-rate multiplier used by warmup.
field_descriptions.hard_mining_strength: How aggressively hard samples should be shown more often.
field_descriptions.hard_mining_ema_alpha: Smoothing factor for the sample difficulty estimate between steps.
field_descriptions.hard_pixel_mining_ratio: What fraction of the hardest pixels should influence loss the most.
field_descriptions.cutout_enabled: Randomly erase rectangular regions in training images only.
field_descriptions.cutout_probability: Probability of applying cutout to each training sample.
field_descriptions.cutout_holes: How many rectangular regions to erase in one sample.
field_descriptions.cutout_size_ratio: Relative size of each cutout rectangle compared to patch width and height.
field_descriptions.random_artifacts_enabled: Overlay synthetic textured artifacts on training images only.
field_descriptions.random_artifacts_probability: Probability of adding synthetic artifacts to a training sample.
field_descriptions.random_artifacts_count: How many synthetic artifacts may be added to one training sample.
field_descriptions.random_artifacts_size_ratio: Maximum artifact size relative to patch width and height.
field_descriptions.mixup_enabled: Mix pairs of training samples within a batch.
field_descriptions.mixup_probability: Probability of applying mixup to a training batch.
field_descriptions.mixup_alpha: Beta-distribution alpha parameter used to sample mixup interpolation weight.
field_descriptions.rare_patch_oversampling_factor: How many times to repeat patches that intersect manually selected rare regions.
field_descriptions.early_stop_patience: How many epochs to wait for improvement before stopping.
field_descriptions.early_stop_min_delta: Minimum improvement that should count as a real improvement.

rare_patch_editor.title: Rare region editor
rare_patch_editor.hint: Drag with the left mouse button to add a rectangle, or with the right mouse button to erase it. Ctrl+Z undoes the last change.
rare_patch_editor.empty_error: No matched sample/label pairs were found.

webui.page_subtitle: Local browser interface for training, fine-tuning, and recognition without opening the desktop window.
webui.toggle_settings_tip: Show or hide the right-side panel with training settings.
webui.select_path_tip: Open the system file or folder picker.
webui.autosave_hint: Changes are saved in your browser and restored the next time this page is opened.
webui.picker_local_only: Path picker is available only from localhost.
webui.picker_dialog_failed: Failed to open the file dialog: {error}

js.csrf_missing: CSRF token is missing. Reload the page and try again.
js.pick_path_failed: Failed to choose a path. Check Web UI logs.

tooltips.work_mode: Choose whether to train, recognize, or run the full pipeline.
tooltips.source_folder: Folder with source images for recognition.
tooltips.result_folder: Folder where recognition results will be written.
tooltips.sample_folder: Folder with images used to train the model.
tooltips.label_folder: Folder with masks or labels paired with training images.
tooltips.model_path: Path to an existing `.pth` model for fine-tuning or recognition.
tooltips.epochs: How many full passes over the training data to run.

work_modes.further_training: Continue training an existing model and recognize
work_modes.recognition_only: Recognition with an existing model only

errors.source_folder_missing: The “Source files folder” field must point to an existing directory.
errors.result_folder_missing: The “Output folder” field must point to an existing directory.
errors.sample_folder_missing: Training requires an existing folder with training images.
errors.label_folder_missing: Training requires an existing folder with masks or labels.
errors.model_path_missing: The selected mode requires a valid `.pth` model file path.

labels.skip_uniform_labels: Skip empty and fully filled masks
labels.rare_patch_oversampling_enabled: Show marked rare-zone patches more often

tooltips.step: How far the extraction window moves between neighboring patches.
tooltips.vertical_rotation: Add upside-down frames to training data.
tooltips.horizontal_rotation: Add 90° and 270° rotations to training data.
tooltips.flip_x: Add frame reflections relative to the X axis.
tooltips.flip_y: Add frame reflections relative to the Y axis.
tooltips.additional_augmentation: Add photometric brightness, contrast, gamma, noise, and blur changes.
tooltips.random_crop: In online mode, use random patch coordinates instead of a fixed extraction grid. Patch step is ignored.
tooltips.crops_per_image: How many random crops to sample from one image in online random crop mode.
tooltips.scale_augmentation: Add an extra zoomed-in or zoomed-out patch variant for each online sample.
tooltips.scale_augmentation_strength: How strongly scale augmentation zooms patches in or out before resizing them back.
tooltips.augmentation_brightness_strength: How strongly brightness may change during augmentation.
tooltips.augmentation_contrast_strength: How strongly contrast may change during augmentation.
tooltips.augmentation_noise_probability: Probability of adding noise to a patch.
tooltips.sync_patch_sizes: When enabled, recognition patch size follows training patch size.
tooltips.model: Model architecture name from the registry or a custom name.
tooltips.color_mode: Choose the input image format: Grayscale or RGB.
tooltips.use_validation: Reserve part of the data to monitor quality during training.
tooltips.validation_percent: Percentage of data reserved for validation only.
tooltips.sample_cut_mode: Save patches to disk in advance or generate them on the fly.
tooltips.batch_size: Number of patches in one training step.
tooltips.dataloader_num_workers: Number of worker processes used by the training DataLoader. Use -1 for automatic selection.
tooltips.overlap: Overlap between neighboring windows during recognition.
tooltips.confidence_save_mode: Choose whether to save a separate confidence map file during recognition.
tooltips.recognition_tta_enabled: Apply flip-based test-time augmentation before averaging the final recognition mask.
tooltips.confidence_tta_enabled: Apply flip-based test-time augmentation before forming the confidence map.
tooltips.log_update_frequency: How many batches to wait before refreshing logs. 0 = automatic.
tooltips.crop_enabled: Enable cropping of noisy image borders.
tooltips.edge_cut_size: How many pixels to remove from each border.
tooltips.optimizer_name: Algorithm used to update model weights.
tooltips.mixed_precision: GPU precision mode used for speed and memory savings.
tooltips.loss_function: How model error is measured during training.
tooltips.dice_loss_weight: Contribution of the Dice component in a combined loss.
tooltips.iou_loss_weight: Contribution of the IoU component in a combined loss.
tooltips.learning_rate: Learning rate: how quickly model weights are updated.
tooltips.deep_supervision: Train convolutional segmentation models with auxiliary decoder heads.
tooltips.warmup_enabled: Gradually ramp up the learning rate at the start of training.
tooltips.warmup_epochs: How many epochs should use warmup.
tooltips.warmup_start_factor: Initial learning-rate multiplier used by warmup.
tooltips.scheduler_name: Learning-rate schedule applied after optimizer updates.
tooltips.scheduler_plateau_factor: Multiplier applied to the learning rate when ReduceLROnPlateau triggers.
tooltips.scheduler_plateau_patience: How many epochs without improvement to wait before reducing the learning rate.
tooltips.scheduler_plateau_threshold: Minimum loss improvement that counts as progress for ReduceLROnPlateau.
tooltips.scheduler_plateau_min_lr: Lower bound for the learning rate used by ReduceLROnPlateau.
tooltips.scheduler_plateau_cooldown: How many epochs to wait after a reduction before checking again.
tooltips.scheduler_cosine_t_max: Number of scheduler epochs used by one cosine annealing cycle.
tooltips.scheduler_cosine_eta_min: Minimum learning rate reached by CosineAnnealingLR.
tooltips.scheduler_one_cycle_max_lr: Peak learning rate reached by OneCycleLR.
tooltips.scheduler_one_cycle_pct_start: Fraction of training spent increasing the learning rate in OneCycleLR.
tooltips.scheduler_one_cycle_anneal_strategy: Shape of the learning-rate decay curve in OneCycleLR.
tooltips.scheduler_one_cycle_div_factor: Initial LR is max_lr divided by this factor in OneCycleLR.
tooltips.scheduler_one_cycle_final_div_factor: Minimum LR is initial LR divided by this factor in OneCycleLR.
tooltips.scheduler_one_cycle_three_phase: Use the original three-phase OneCycle schedule instead of the fast two-phase variant.
tooltips.scheduler_step_lr_step_size: How many epochs to wait between StepLR reductions.
tooltips.scheduler_step_lr_gamma: Multiplier applied to the learning rate on each StepLR decay step.
tooltips.hard_mining_enabled: Show the model examples with high error more often.
tooltips.hard_mining_strength: How strongly hard examples should be replayed.
tooltips.hard_mining_ema_alpha: Smoothing factor for the difficulty estimate between batches.
tooltips.hard_pixel_mining_enabled: Make loss focus more on the hardest pixels.
tooltips.hard_pixel_mining_ratio: What fraction of the hardest pixels should be emphasized.
tooltips.cutout_enabled: Randomly erase rectangular regions in training images only.
tooltips.cutout_probability: Probability of applying cutout to each training sample.
tooltips.cutout_holes: How many rectangular regions to erase in one sample.
tooltips.cutout_size_ratio: Relative size of each cutout rectangle compared to patch width and height.
tooltips.random_artifacts_enabled: Overlay synthetic textured artifacts on training images only.
tooltips.random_artifacts_probability: Probability of adding synthetic artifacts to a training sample.
tooltips.random_artifacts_count: How many synthetic artifacts may be added to one training sample.
tooltips.random_artifacts_size_ratio: Maximum artifact size relative to patch width and height.
tooltips.mixup_enabled: Mix pairs of training samples within a batch.
tooltips.mixup_probability: Probability of applying mixup to a training batch.
tooltips.mixup_alpha: Beta-distribution alpha parameter used to sample mixup interpolation weight.
tooltips.skip_uniform_labels: Ignore patches where the mask is completely empty or completely filled.
tooltips.early_stopping_enabled: Stop training if validation quality stops improving.
tooltips.early_stopping_patience: How many epochs to wait for improvement before stopping.
tooltips.early_stopping_min_delta: Minimum improvement that counts as meaningful progress.
tooltips.early_stopping_restore_best_weights: Load the best checkpoint after training stops.
tooltips.torch_compile_enabled: Try to speed up the model with torch.compile.
tooltips.show_batch_preview: Display image, label, and prediction previews during training.
tooltips.use_multi_gpu: Use multiple GPUs when they are available.
tooltips.rare_patch_oversampling_enabled: In online mode, repeat patches intersecting manually marked rare regions.
tooltips.rare_patch_oversampling_factor: How many times to repeat patches that intersect manually marked rare regions.

sample_cut_mode.disk: Cut patches and save to disk

augmentation_preview_dialog.status_template: Variant #{variant}. Middle mouse button switches the preview mode.
augmentation_preview_dialog.mode_template: Mode: {mode}. Middle mouse button switches between original and augmented views.
augmentation_preview_dialog.empty_error: No matched sample/label pairs were found.

tic_tac_toe.reset_confirm: Delete the AI's accumulated game experience?
tic_tac_toe.stats_template: Games: {games} | AI wins: {ai_wins} | Player wins: {user_wins} | Draws: {draws}
tic_tac_toe.status_user_win: You won. The neural network will remember this result.
tic_tac_toe.status_ai_win: The AI won. Its weights have been updated.
tic_tac_toe.status_draw: Draw. The neural network stored the result.
tic_tac_toe.status_unavailable: Mini-game unavailable: PyTorch was not found.
